response.justification: Candidate is a solid mid-to-senior full-stack engineer with ~16 years of experience, but the role requires a director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized AI expertise and cloud platform strategy experience. The resume shows minimal AI/ML work (only a brief mention of MCP tooling at current role), no evidence of platform-scale AI products, no advisory or thought-leadership track record with strategic customers, and no demonstrated engineering leadership at the Principal/Director level.
strengths: ~16 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Active community contributor with talks, workshops, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Recent exposure to agentic workflows and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise required for the role
Lacks Principal/Director-level scope — no evidence of cross-org technical leadership or strategy work
Minimal cloud platform depth (some AWS CDK) and no advisory experience with strategic customers/partners

key_factors.factor: Insufficient seniority for Principal/Director IC scope
